name: AREthSDRequireService
title: AREthSDRequireService
description: A service that was unregistered at the node (consumer) using the AREthSDReleaseService function can be registered again with this function. The associated Service Discovery message (Find Service) is then sent if necessary.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the required Consumed Service Instance ( see AREthCreateConsumedServiceInstance).

return: Handle of the required Consumed Service
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
